---
ID: US-OLV-062
Title: Show quick command chips
Status: Code Present
Verified: false
Backdated: 2026-04-20
Milestone: Introduce shared OliverDock and upload flows

As a operator
I want module commands as clickable chips
So that common actions are one click away

Acceptance Criteria:
- [ ] Non-granular actions render in a toolbar row.
- [ ] Clicking a chip executes its action or starts a matching flow.
- [ ] Chip rows wrap without covering the input bar.
- [ ] Granular entity actions stay hidden from the chip row.

Notes: Granular/fuzzy split was added on Apr 22.
